evidence.snippet: Trillium Engineering specializes in the design and production of gimbaled imaging systems for crewed and uncrewed aircraft.

Trillium has quickly become a leading provider in gimbal innovations. With a product line that meets the requirements of Group 1, 2, and 3 UAS, Trillium is able to serve the customer needs of the government, commercial and civil sectors.

evidence.snippet: Skylink Software

SkyLink is a fully integrated gimbal user interface that does not require additional implementation of communication protocol to get it to work with your system. Trillium imaging systems automatically utilize SkyLink software without further system configuration.

items.notes: SkyLink GCS software with geolocation, tracking, post-mission analysis; bundled with gimbal hardware

evidence.snippet: SkyLink-AIM
Trillium Engineering's HD45 Gimbal Achieves AUVSI Green UAS Certification

The broader goal for Trillium engaging with the Green UAS program is not only to ensure product security and compliance but also to participate in an evolving ecosystem where such certifications are increasingly becoming a benchmark for quality and reliability in the uncrewed systems market.

ndaa.notes: HD45-LV-CZ received AUVSI Green UAS Certification. The article body (line 38, too long to cite directly) states Green UAS 'focuses on verifying...compliance of commercial systems with the National Defense Authorization Act (NDAA) supply chain requirements.'

evidence.snippet: Trillium Engineering's HD45 Gimbal Achieves AUVSI Green UAS Certification

blue_uas.notes: Article body (line 40, too long to cite directly) states 'Successful certification places the HD45 on the Green UAS cleared list, and on the Blue UAS Framework List.' Green UAS is an extension of the Blue UAS certification program.

evidence.snippet: Trillium Engineering specializes in the design and production of gimbaled imaging systems for crewed and uncrewed aircraft.

Trillium has quickly become a leading provider in gimbal innovations. With a product line that meets the requirements of Group 1, 2, and 3 UAS, Trillium is able to serve the customer needs of the government, commercial and civil sectors.

readiness.notes: Serial production of catalog gimbal line HD25-HD95; ISO 9001 certified; Army and Marine Corps contracts confirmed

unresolved_questions: Blue UAS Framework List and NDAA claims in resource-0020 lines 38 and 40 exceed 60-word citation cap; key facts documented in notes

fetch_requests.reason: Would list all current gimbal SKUs/variants to complete the products list

tagline: Designs and manufactures stabilized camera gimbals (HD25–HD95 series) and ground software (SkyLink) for Group 1–3 unmanned systems, supporting visible through LWIR imaging. NDAA-compliant, Blue UAS certified, in production. Notable recent integrations include Army's next-generation long-range reconnaissance platform and AV Puma LE. Public evidence on specific defense contracts remains limited.
